title: oncidium planilabre
intro: Oncidium planilabre is a species of orchid native to Central and South America, characterized by its flat, labellum-like lip and white to yellowish flowers. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine, where its roots and leaves are believed to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Oncidium planilabre include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis. Herbal preparations of Oncidium planilabre are often made into infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to the affected area.
